text.title: Pyramid vs Trophy Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the per-module test-strategy decisions.

forbidden.pattern: single shape applied across all modules without per-module diagnostic
module with shape=pyramid AND zero integration tests of any kind (shape becomes exclusion, not proportion)
shape_rationale shorter than 30 words OR generic phrasing not referencing the diagnostic answers
rebalancing_plan = empty for a module whose current distribution differs > 30% from the target shape

allowed-transformations.transformation: Defer non-PR-time tests (e2e, slow integration) to nightly runs to stay under the PR-time budget.
Parallelise unit suite across CI workers when runtime exceeds the per-module budget despite trimming.
Adopt a new shape on a new module immediately; for an existing module, the rebalancing plan stages it across 2-3 release cycles.

list.item: Per-module decisions, not a global default
Diagnostic answers populated from data (not opinion)
Shape rationale references the diagnostic answers explicitly
Runtime budget per module documented and respected
